title: Google Remy, Grok 5, Mythos 1, New Atlas Robot, ASI… and More AI News This Month!
summary: A review of major AI announcements including Google's Remy agent, Grok 5, Anthropic's Mythos 1, DeepSeek price cuts, and Boston Dynamics' upgraded Atlas robot. The video argues that the most significant trend is the emergence of AI agents capable of work, coding, and adaptation rather than just question-answering, alongside advances in humanoid robotics.
